text: I feel a curious anticipation standing in these spaces. The first scene is quiet, expansive—almost meditative in its emptiness, evoking a sense of expectancy, as though something significant could happen here. The second scene stimulates my mind with its vibrant design and talk of research and development. I feel a spark of intellectual excitement, eager to explore what new ideas or inventions might be revealed. Together, these moments make me reflect on human potential—how blank spaces invite creation, and how creative arenas celebrate what we bring forth.
